Verified trades
Why TradeMatch

Every tradesperson.
Rigorously vetted.

Before any tradesperson appears in our directory, they go through a structured verification process. Not a checkbox — a genuine gate.

Identity Verified
Every tradesperson is verified via Gov.uk Verify integration. No anonymous profiles, no ghost accounts.
Insurance Confirmed
Public liability insurance is uploaded, reviewed, and expiry-monitored. Lapsed coverage triggers automatic suspension.
Trade Registrations Checked
Gas Safe, NICEIC, NAPIT and other trade registrations are API-verified — not self-reported. You see the last verification date on every profile.
Tamper-Proof Reviews
Reviews are collected directly post-job. They can't be suppressed, edited, or deleted by the tradesperson. Ever.
Getting Started

Post a job in 3 minutes

No account required to post. No commitment until you choose a quote.

01
Describe your job
Tell us the trade, what needs doing, your postcode, and rough budget. Takes under 3 minutes — no account needed.
02
Receive up to 5 quotes
Up to 5 verified local tradespeople receive your lead and submit detailed quotes. Compare profiles, ratings, and prices.
03
Hire with escrow protection
Choose your tradesperson and pay via escrow. Funds are released only when you're satisfied — zero risk.
Ready?

Tell us what you need.
We'll find your tradesperson.

Free to post. No commitment. Up to 5 quotes from verified tradespeople in your area.
